questions.description: Character-level F1 between extracted text and gold text content
questions.scope_guardrail: Normalize whitespace and unicode before comparison. Do not penalize header/footer differences if gold set excludes them.

questions.description: Detection coverage over element types (text_block, table, figure, equation, etc.)
questions.scope_guardrail: Only count element types present in gold elements. Extra predicted types are not penalized.

questions.description: Tree Edit Distance Similarity for tables - measures structural and content fidelity
questions.scope_guardrail: Compare only tables present in both predicted and gold. Missing tables are counted separately via structure_recall.

questions.description: Kendall tau correlation for reading order validation between predicted and gold element sequences
questions.scope_guardrail: Only consider elements that appear in both predicted and gold sequences.
